response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience with C++ or Rust in geospatial routing pipelines, despite extensive full-stack and web-focused work; their geospatial projects use DLang and Node.js, not the required C++/Rust stack, and there is no evidence of distributed systems, routing tile optimization, or navigation data pipeline experience critical to the role.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions in geospatial tools (GISCollective, Open Green Map)
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and learn new languages quickly
Strong background in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling with measurable impact
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C++ or Rust in production systems
Lacks exposure to routing data pipelines, map tiling, or navigation systems
Geospatial work uses DLang/Node.js, not the required C++/Linux/distributed systems stack
